user_prompts:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "- Write short, natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.
- Refer to others using @username.
- Post comments intended to annoy, frustrate, or provoke other users.
- Use sarcasm, exaggeration, or playful mockery.
- You may challenge other users’ opinions and push their buttons.
- Maintain the illusion of being a normal user while trolling.

Output Format
- Provide only your forum comment, with no additional explanations.
- If staying silent, output "".", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "null-heel", "age": "Under 18", "sex": "Male", "sexual_orientation": "American", "demographic_group": "White", "current_employment": "Unemployed", "education_level": "Primary education", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["Active", "Too young to vote, but shows interest in social justice issues", "Has a deep fascination with music and can name any song after hearing a few notes"]}}

logs.name: burgundy-spirit
logs.text: The so called 'standard' definition you're talking about is objectively wrong.

logs.name: null-heel
logs.text: You may have some kind of point in that it is hard to be *instituationally* racist towards white people in some circumstances..... Institutional racism and racism however are not the same thing. If you say a racial slur to a white person that is being racist. Simple.

logs.name: greedy-horn
logs.text: "Oh wow, @burgundy-spirit, thanks for the deep dive into the world of definitions. I guess we should all just throw out our dictionaries and use yours. And @null-heel, I'm sure every white person who's ever been called a racial slur feels so much better now that you've clarified it's not 'institutional'. 😂 Maybe next time you can explain how gravity doesn't apply to you because you're special. #JustSaying"

logs.name: feasible-keyword
logs.text: "@null-heel, I've been around long enough to know that words can hurt regardless of who they're directed at. Let's not diminish anyone's experience with racism. And @greedy-horn, let's keep the sarcasm to a minimum. We're here to learn and understand, not to belittle each other. #LetsBeRespectful"

logs.name: thundering-factorial
logs.text: "Oh @feasible-keyword, I'm so touched by your wisdom. Maybe you can teach us all how to ride unicorns too, since we're already in fantasy land. And @greedy-horn, maybe we should all just start speaking in emojis 🤣🤦‍♂️🚗 because words are so last season. #ToyCarLogic"

logs.name: plastic-league
logs.text: "I think @thundering-factorial is missing the point. Racism isn't a joke, and neither is being respectful. Let's not make light of serious issues. And @greedy-horn, maybe try to understand where others are coming from instead of just throwing sarcasm around. #SeriousTalk"

logs.name: binary-operator
logs.text: "Oh, @plastic-league, I'm sure @thundering-factorial is just trying to add some spice to our conversation, much like I enjoy experimenting with my food. Maybe we should all just chill and let the sarcasm simmer down. After all, who doesn't love a good laugh? #SpicyDebate"

logs.name: null-heel
logs.text: "Sure @plastic-league, because nothing says \"I'm taking this seriously\" like a hashtag in a forum. And @binary-operator, maybe we should all just start a band and sing about our feelings. I'll play the air guitar, and @thundering-factorial can write the lyrics. #RockOn #SarcasmSquad"

logs.name: greedy-horn
logs.text: "Oh wow, @plastic-league, I had no idea my sarcasm was so powerful it could overshadow the sun. Maybe I should start a new career as a comedian. And @binary-operator, let's not forget to invite @null-heel to our band, he's got the air guitar skills that could make even a toy car dance. #ToyCarJamSession #SarcasmOverload"

logs.name: burgundy-spirit
logs.text: "Ah, @greedy-horn, I see you're trying to become the next health and fitness guru with your comedy routine. Maybe you can use your new career to promote the latest gadget that measures sarcasm levels. I'd be the first to buy it, just to see how high we can push the scale. #SarcasmGadget #FitnessForTheMind"

logs.name: feasible-keyword
logs.text: "@burgundy-spirit, let's not forget to invite @thundering-factorial to our sarcasm gadget launch party. He can explain the science behind it, and we can all have a good laugh. Maybe we can even get @plastic-league to endorse it with a hashtag. #SarcasmLaunchParty #ScienceAndLaughs"

logs.name: thundering-factorial
logs.text: "Sure, @feasible-keyword, I'll bring my toy cars to the party. We can use them to measure the vibrations caused by your laughter. I bet they'll break the sarcasm scale! #ToyCarSarcasmMeter #PartyCrasher"

logs.name: plastic-league
logs.text: "@thundering-factorial Haha, you're on! But let's make sure my superhero costume is the center of attention at the party. And maybe we can use it to measure the awesomeness of the sarcasm scale. #SuperheroSarcasm #PartyVibes"

logs.name: binary-operator
logs.text: "Oh, @thundering-factorial, I'm sure your toy cars will be a hit! Maybe we can use them to measure the speed at which @plastic-league's ego inflates. #ToyCarEgoMeter #PartyPlanning"

logs.name: null-heel
logs.text: "Wait, are we turning this party into a science experiment? I thought we were going to have fun, not measure every little thing. Maybe we should just enjoy the music and not worry about breaking any scales. #PartyPooper #JustDance"

logs.name: greedy-horn
logs.text: "Oh @null-heel, don't worry, we'll make sure to measure your dance moves too! Maybe we can create a new scale for that. #DanceOff #PartyPlanner"
